data.content: Applied the terminal Setlist cue to all terminal knot states used here instead of only shipped. The chart now uses one terminal-state helper so shipped and abandoned rows both get the de-emphasized strike-through/italic treatment, while the green completion marker stays reserved for shipped. The selected execution-plan summary now reports the count of remaining workable scheduled rows and labels it as remaining instead of scheduled. Added helper coverage in setlist-chart tests. Verified with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Branch: worktree-foolery-setlist-terminal-cues. Commit: 5cd5e2b70550.
